Ask Alex Log

What your clients are actually asking the in-portal assistant. Use it to spot coaching themes and to turn real questions into content.

Portal access & IT allowlist

When a client in a locked-down environment (government, large corporate) can't open their portal link, it's almost always their email-security or web filter. Send them the note below to forward to their IT team. It's also attached automatically to the diagnostic link email.

Hi team, I'm taking part in a leadership assessment run by GPS Leadership Solutions. Their portal link won't open on our network. Could you please allowlist the website portal.gpsleadership.org (and gpsleadership.org) and emails from gpsleadership.org, and exclude them from link rewriting/sandboxing? It's a standard, confidential assessment site — no downloads or attachments. Thank you.
What their IT should allowlist:
• Website: portal.gpsleadership.org and gpsleadership.org (exclude from URL rewriting / sandboxing)
• Email senders: alex@gpsleadership.org, team@gpsleadership.org
• Email auth: mail authenticates as gpsleadership.org (SPF/DKIM/DMARC) via Resend
• Links point only to https://portal.gpsleadership.org — don't alter the token in the address

Email Log
How reminders work: Every Monday at 9 AM ET, the system automatically emails clients who haven't submitted their check-in yet. Use Run Reminders Now to trigger that same send immediately — useful for testing or for clients who missed the Monday window.
Recent Sends
Admin Accounts
Admin accounts give your EA or assistant full access to this dashboard using their own password — without changing yours. They can add clients, view check-ins, and run reminders. They cannot change the main coach password.
Account & Security
Coach password
This is the main password for your dashboard. Changing it does not affect your admin/EA accounts.

Client Messages
Loading…
Select a conversation to view and reply.
Email Templates
Review before activating. These templates control the emails sent to stakeholders. Edit the subject and body as needed, then toggle Approved to activate each one. Unapproved templates fall back to the system default. Placeholders like [ClientFirstName] and [SurveyLink] are replaced automatically.
AI Studio
Run your saved prompts against any transcript or notes — output saves directly to the right client record.
Prompt Library
Loading prompts…
Raw Input
Auto-inject ON — the portal will prepend this leader's profile, kickoff brief, and interview summaries before your input. Only paste quantitative scores and qualitative comments below.
Pasted transcripts are never saved — only the structured output is stored.
Output
New Prompt
Examples (optional)
Sample input/output pairs that show Claude what "good" looks like for this prompt. Add them when you have a result you want to use as a gold standard.

Diagnostic Settings

Import Clients from Excel

Upload an .xlsx or .csv. Required: Name and Email. Optional: Title, Organization, Phone, Industry. Headers are auto-detected ("Email Address", "Title", "First Name"+"Last Name", etc. all work). Download template ↓
Imported people come in as clients (not auto-enrolled in coaching) — set up their diagnostic or coaching after.
